creator: valid-amirali-averiva@rambler.ru
text:
Created attachment 250243
/usr/bin/sade unexpected behavior description

Dear FreeBSD team. Thank you very much for your daemon child, I like him.
This report concerns unexpected and unwanted feature of "sade" utility.
The utility does the job good, but it makes unexpected changes in the fstab file.
Please see the attached text description in the file.
Best regards, Valid - Amirali - Averiva AT rambler DOT Ru.
